result.stderr:
Error: Azure Storage account name is required.

Usage: DurableTasksMcp --storage-account <account-name> [--log-file <path>]
   or: DurableTasksMcp -s <account-name> [-l <path>]

Environment variables:
  DTFX_STORAGE_ACCOUNT  - Azure Storage account name
  DTFX_LOG_FILE         - Log file path

Example:
  DurableTasksMcp --storage-account mystorageaccount --log-file ./dtfx-mcp.log

Authentication:
  Uses DefaultAzureCredential which supports:
  - Azure CLI (az login)
  - Environment variables (AZURE_CLIENT_ID, AZURE_TENANT_ID, AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET)
  - Managed Identity
  - Visual Studio / VS Code credentials

Error: Azure Storage account name is required.

Usage: DurableTasksMcp --storage-account <account-name> [--log-file <path>]
   or: DurableTasksMcp -s <account-name> [-l <path>]

Environment variables:
  DTFX_STORAGE_ACCOUNT  - Azure Storage account name
  DTFX_LOG_FILE         - Log file path

Example:
  DurableTasksMcp --storage-account mystorageaccount --log-file ./dtfx-mcp.log

Authentication:
  Uses DefaultAzureCredential which supports:
  - Azure CLI (az login)
